question: In LAMMPS, the differences between units real and units metal do not include ( ).

When using the ReaxFF potential, why is it necessary to set the safety buffer safezone and mincap? Provide the command and recommended values.
Describe a complete crack propagation analysis workflow: from modeling, applying boundaries to post-processing fracture toughness.

Under metal units construct an LJ system with long-range Coulomb (LJ cutoff 10.0 Å, Coulomb long-range 12.0 Å), and add PPPM and LJ tail correction, which of the following snippets is the most reasonable

options.A:
atom_style atomic
pair_style lj/cut 10.0 coul/long 12.0
kspace_style pppm 1.0e-5
pair_modify shift yes
options.B:
atom_style charge
pair_style lj/cut/coul/long 10.0 12.0
kspace_style pppm 1.0e-5
pair_modify tail yes
options.C:
atom_style atomic
pair_style lj/cut/coul/cut 10.0 12.0
kspace_style pppm 1.0e-4
pair_modify tail yes
options.D:
atom_style full
pair_style lj/cut 12.0
kspace_style ewald 1.0e-5
pair_modify tail no

question: Regarding the constraints between read_data and data files/units, which statements are correct

options.A: Before calling read_data, atom_style matching the data file must already be set

options.D: The Atoms section will read charges only when the used atom_style supports the charge field

question: Regarding the use of compute heat/flux, which statements are correct

options.B: It is necessary to define compute pe/atom in advance (or a supported potential energy/atom implementation)

question: Regarding the trade-off between PPPM accuracy and cost, which are correct

options.C: Under a fixed target RMS force error, a trade-off can be made between real/reciprocal space
options.D: For kspace_style pppm, a smaller accuracy parameter represents higher accuracy

question: Regarding pair_style hybrid and hybrid/overlay, which statements are correct

options.C: Some many-body potentials (such as reax/c, eam) can overlay with other potentials, but physical rationality must be ensured
options.D: hybrid/overlay must be used together with kspace_styleslab

options.D: compute heat/flux depends on the above three compute

question: Regarding the practical points of fix deform, which are correct

question: Regarding rigid body handling (fix rigid/rigid/small), which are correct

options.B: Molecules can be treated as rigid bodies to integrate with a larger timestep
options.C: Rotational degrees of freedom must be included when computing temperature

question: Regarding neighbor list strategies to improve energy stability, which practices are effective

question: Regarding script control and multi-stage runs, which statements are correct

options.A: label/next/jump can implement loop scanning of temperature/density
options.B: variable index and variable loop are often used with next
options.C: shell commands can create directories and move files
options.D: the log command can switch the log output file

question: Regarding dump and its modifiers, which statements are correct

options.A: dump custom can output fields such as id type x y z vx vy vz
options.B: dump_modify sort id can output sorted by atom id
options.C: dump_modify scale yes can output lattice unit coordinates (depending on the command)
options.D: dump image can directly output a numerical table of displacement-velocity-force

question: Regarding temperature definition and removal of flow field processing, which are correct

options.A: compute temp/partial can remove some components
options.C: In shear flow one should thermostat the peculiar velocity
options.D: Directly thermostatting the total velocity can still give correct transport properties

question: Regarding many-body potentials and heat flux calculation, what needs attention

options.A: Many-body potentials need to consistently define per-atom potential energy and stress
options.B: compute heat/flux may be unavailable for some many-body potentials or require additional implementation
options.C: Different implementations of per-atom assignment may lead to detailed differences, but macroscopically consistent
options.D: For calculating heat flux with reax/c, consult the corresponding documentation and example scripts

question: Regarding common combinations of deformation and statistics, which are reasonable

options.A: fix deform + compute pressure/virial + fix ave/time output stress–strain
options.B: fix deform + compute msd directly equivalent to experimental flow curve
options.C: When fix deform and nvt are used simultaneously, be careful with parameters to avoid temperature bias
options.D: The choice of remap x will directly affect the measured velocity profile and temperature

question: Regarding using replicate, change_box, and read_data in combination to build large systems, which are correct

options.A: replicate can quickly replicate periodic configurations
options.B: change_box can change box size/tilt and can remap atom coordinates
options.C: read_data can directly read large systems and must match atom_style
options.D: After replicate it is necessary to check the consistency of velocity/topology/molecule ID, etc.

question: Regarding the relationship between the energy minimization stage and dynamical fixes, which are correct

options.A: During minimize, dynamical fixes (such as nve/nvt) do not take effect
options.B: Before minimize, fix box/relax can be used to relax the box shape at the same time
options.C: min_style fire is a common robust choice
options.D: minimize does not change the velocity distribution, therefore it can be directly regarded as NVE sampling

question: Regarding the LAMMPS variable system, which understandings are correct

options.A: variable equal type is used for scalar expressions
options.B: variable atom type returns per-atom quantities and can be used with dump or fix ave/chunk
options.C: next and jump can iterate over index/loop variables
options.D: Variables can reference outputs of compute and fix (such as c_ID, f_ID)

question: For membrane/interface systems, to keep the position centered for visualization and analysis, which practices are feasible

options.A: fix recenter to center a specific group
options.B: dump_modify unwrap yes to remove PBC wrapping
options.C: Perform unwrap and alignment on coordinates in post-processing
options.D: Use compute chunk/atom bin/1d z and perform time averaging on the density distribution

question: Regarding the key settings of the CHARMM force field in LAMMPS, which are correct

options.A: pair_style lj/charmm/coul/long is often paired with kspace_style pppm
options.B: dihedral_style charmm, improper_style class2 etc. need to match the parameter set
options.C: special_bonds charmm to adopt CHARMM's 1-4 convention
options.D: When reading psf/prm, topotools/moltemplate are often used to preprocess to generate a data file

question: Regarding EAM and mixing rules, which statements are correct

options.A: EAM does not use Lorentz–Berthelot mixing rules; interactions are determined by the embedding function and electron density term
options.B: The pair_coeff of eam/alloy requires the element mapping order to be consistent with the number of types
options.C: EAM can be overlaid with additional short-range potentials but the physical meaning must be treated with caution
options.D: In EAM, the concepts of σ and ε are different from LJ, and pair_modify mix is not applicable

question: Regarding fix qeq/reax and reax/c, which statements are correct

options.A: reax/c requires charge equilibration (qeq) to update atomic charges
options.B: The step of fix qeq/reax should match the outer integration step, often executed every step
options.C: The tolerance and iteration limit of qeq will affect energy convergence and stability
options.D: reax/c can be used together with PPPM to handle long-range Coulomb

question: Regarding compute msd/chunk and phase separation analysis, which are correct

options.A: First use compute chunk/atom to divide atoms into chunks by region or type
options.B: msd/chunk can calculate the MSD of each chunk separately
options.C: fix ave/time can output the MSD–t curve of each chunk

question: Regarding thermostat and transport property evaluation, which are more reasonable

options.A: Weakly coupled NHC causes less distortion to long-time dynamics
options.B: When evaluating diffusion/viscosity it is common to pre-equilibrate with NVT and then switch to NVE for sampling
options.C: Strong Langevin damping will change fluctuations leading to bias in GK results
options.D: Berendsen thermostat can be used for strict canonical ensemble statistical analysis

question: Regarding the use of fix ave/correlate, which statements are correct

options.A: Can compute time correlation functions such as VACF/stress autocorrelation
options.B: Need to set sampling steps, window length and number of repeats to reduce noise
options.C: The output can be directly integrated to obtain GK coefficients
options.D: Equivalent to fix ave/time and interchangeable

question: Regarding the meaning and effects of newton on/off, which are correct

options.A: newton on allows "half computation" of pair forces to reduce communication
options.B: newton off is more robust for some calculations containing constraints/many-body potentials
options.C: the bond subsystem can independently set newton bond on/off
options.D: the newton setting will change the theoretical correctness of energy conservation

question: Regarding the script key points of temperature replica (REMD), which are correct

options.B: Set different target temperatures and random seeds for each partition
options.C: fix temper/modern/temper is responsible for exchange attempts and statistics
options.D: It is necessary to ensure sufficient overlap of energy distributions to improve exchange rate

question: Regarding LAMMPS pressure calculation and reporting, which are correct

options.A: compute pressure needs to specify a temperature compute to provide the kinetic energy term
options.B: thermo_modify press myPress only affects output, does not affect fix npt pressure control
options.C: fix_modify npt press myPress will affect pressure control
options.D: compute stress/atom summed then divided by volume and negated can obtain the macroscopic pressure tensor

question: Regarding initial configuration and velocity setup, which practices are more robust

options.A: Define mass first and then velocity create, to ensure temperature calculation is correct
options.B: After velocity scale/gaussian, the total momentum/total angular momentum is often removed
options.C: When using read_data to read in data containing velocities, velocities can also be randomized again to remove bias
options.D: For multiphase systems, temperature setting and velocity initialization can be done separately by group
